//: MVC runs DAILY crons (Vercel Hobby tier limit). The upstream template uses hourly crons because it supports churches in any timezone; MVC is a single-timezone deployment (Mountain Time, Kiowa CO), so timezone-aware hourly sending is unnecessary. Do NOT cherry-pick this change back to the template.

crons.//: Devotionals: 12:00 UTC = ~6 AM MDT (summer), ~5 AM MST (winter). Slight DST drift is acceptable for morning devotional delivery.

Digest: 20:00 UTC = ~2 PM MDT / ~1 PM MST. The route only fires the send on the configured day-of-week, and is idempotent per week. The exact hour does not matter under a daily schedule (see app/api/cron/digest/route.ts).
